SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.compressor

Class AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.InstrumentSignal

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.compressor.AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.InstrumentSignal
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem
public static class AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.InstrumentSignal extends Object implements Serializable
Validated transmitter signal.

  • Constructor Details

    • InstrumentSignal

      public InstrumentSignal(String name, double minimum, double maximum, double lagTime)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      name - signal name
      minimum - minimum valid value
      maximum - maximum valid value
      lagTime - first-order lag time in seconds; zero disables lag

  • Method Details

    • update

      public double update(double rawValue, double dt)
      Update the signal from a raw process value.
      Parameters:
      rawValue - raw value
      dt - timestep in seconds
      Returns:
      filtered and faulted value
